narrative:
Muskingum Township has 3,347 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
